name: Genex Ally Reliever
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ａ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アーリー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>・ジェネクス・リバイバー
desc: If you negate the activation of a Spell Card, Trap Card, or Effect Monster's effect activated by your opponent, you can Special Summon this card from your hand.
mnst_eff: If you negate the activation of a Spell Card, Trap Card, or Effect Monster's effect activated by your opponent, you can Special Summon this card from your hand.
eff: If you negate the activation of a Spell Card, Trap Card, or Effect Monster's effect activated by your opponent, you can Special Summon this card from your hand.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
